title: cicerbita plumieri
intro: Cicerbita plumieri, also known as Plumieri's lettuce, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the daisy family. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Cicerbita plumieri include the treatment of fever, rheumatic pain, and digestive issues, as well as its use as a laxative and diuretic. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used as a tea or infused in oil to extract its active compounds.
